data.body: Manifest-authentication fix done: op-cert binds manifest into DSSE predicate; verify_opcert_record surfaces signed_manifest; compute_validity plan-review uses _authoritative_manifest for deps/regver/pinned-basis. Subject digest unchanged (predicate, not subject) -> #664 merge-gate intact (17/17). 858+10 tests green, attest.py 736<880. Running FULL make test before PS6.
